title: Evaluation of Industrial Fuel Switching and Hydrogen Supply programmes
body: "DESNZ has funded two independent evaluations of these innovation programmes. The first covers Carbon Capture and Utilisation Demonstration (CCUD) innovation programme, the CCUS Innovation programme and the Accelerating CCS Technologies (ACT) programme, rounds 1 and 2.  This report covers the Industrial Fuel Switching and the Hydrogen Supply programmes.  The evaluations assessed both the delivery processes and the achievements and impacts of the innovation programmes.  "
